violations.text: No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front service area is lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The establishment does not have proper labels/a list of ingredients for their self-service hot-holding items. Self-service items in a food establishment must be labeled with with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine/quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
